name: Convergys Corporation
description: Convergys Corporation was a global leader in customer experience outsourcing, providing customer management and information management solutions. Headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio, the company delivered billing, customer care, and employee care services to clients in various industries, including telecommunications, technology, financial services, and healthcare. In 2018, Convergys was acquired by Synnex and integrated into its Concentrix division, creating a premier global customer engagement services company.
